channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Debates Over Long Covid: Scientific Uncertainty, Patient Experiences, and Treatment Controversies
item.description: The article explores the ongoing scientific uncertainty and controversy surrounding long Covid, six years after the peak of the COVID-19 pandemic. Despite billions of dollars in research and internati...

item.title: June fuel price adjustments see petrol increase while diesel and paraffin prices drop in South Africa
item.description: South African motorists will experience mixed fuel price adjustments from 3 June 2026, with petrol users facing higher costs while diesel, paraffin and LPG consumers benefit from notable reductions. A...

item.title: NVIDIA Launches RTX Spark ARM-Based Superchip for AI and Graphics in Windows PCs and Laptops
item.description: NVIDIA has officially introduced the RTX Spark, a new ARM-based superchip designed to deliver high-performance AI and graphics capabilities to Windows PCs and laptops. Unveiled at Computex, the RTX Sp...

item.title: Dating apps turn to AI matchmaking amid declining user satisfaction and engagement
item.description: This opinion article examines the growing shift among dating apps towards artificial intelligence as a solution to declining user engagement and widespread dissatisfaction with swipe-based matchmaking...

item.title: U.S. and Iran Exchange Strikes Amid Ongoing War Negotiations
item.description: Over the past weekend, the U.S. military conducted strikes targeting Iranian radar and drone installations near the strategic Strait of Hormuz, according to the U.S. Central Command. These actions are...

item.title: Kenyans contribute over KSh 1 million to support TikToker Val’s mother’s burial expenses
item.description: Kenyans have come together in a strong show of solidarity to support TikTok content creator Odundo Valery, popularly known as Val, following the death of her mother. According to reports, well-wishers...

item.title: Arsenal’s Double Success Overshadowed by Champions League Final Defeat
item.description: Arsenal’s 2025/26 campaign has been defended as a major success despite the disappointment of losing the UEFA Champions League final to Paris Saint-Germain. In an opinion piece, the author argues that...

item.title: PMD issues weather advisory for rain, thunderstorms and dust storms across Pakistan from June 2–5
item.description: The Pakistan Meteorological Department (PMD) has issued a weather advisory predicting widespread rain, thunderstorms and dust storms across the upper parts of the country from June 2 to June 5. Accord...

item.title: How a personal tragedy helped inspire breakthroughs in inflammation science and bioelectronic medicine
item.description: The article follows the life and scientific career of Dr. Kevin J. Tracey, a neurosurgeon whose experience with a tragic pediatric case in 1985 profoundly influenced his future research. While treatin...

item.title: Former Trump aide warns trade policies are hurting farmers and threatening Republican support
item.description: Marc Short, a former aide to President Donald Trump, has warned that the administration’s trade policies are severely impacting American farmers, putting the Republican Party’s Senate majority at risk...

item.title: Fuschia Ravena congratulates Vanessa Pulgarin for winning MGI All Stars
item.description: Fuschia Ravena, a well-known personality in the pageant and beauty queen community, publicly extended her congratulations to Vanessa Pulgarin after she was named the winner of the MGI All Stars compet...

item.title: Jeffrey Epstein's Preserved Sperm Raises Legal and Ethical Questions
item.description: Newly released Department of Justice files reveal that Jeffrey Epstein, the late convicted sex offender, banked his sperm years before his 2019 death. Epstein deposited his sperm with California Cryob...

item.title: Analysis: Supreme Court emergency rulings expanded Trump’s executive authority, says Slate
item.description: An opinion analysis published by Slate argues that the public focus on occasional tensions between Chief Justice John Roberts and President Donald Trump obscures a more significant development within ...

item.title: FDA Flags and Recalls Sexual Enhancement Chocolates and Honey Products Containing Undisclosed Erectile Dysfunction Drugs
item.description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has issued a series of warnings and recalls involving a range of so-called “sexual enhancement” chocolates and honey products after laboratory testing revea...

item.title: Bilawal urges constitutional safeguards for Gilgit-Baltistan rights during election rally in Shigar
item.description: Pakistan Peoples Party (PPP) Chairman Bilawal Bhutto-Zardari, while addressing an election rally in Shigar, Gilgit-Baltistan, stressed that any future constitutional amendment in Pakistan must include...

item.title: SA Requests Evidence from US on Forced Labour in Imports
item.description: Trade, Industry and Competition Minister Parks Tau has formally asked the United States to provide evidence regarding allegations that certain goods imported from other countries are produced using fo...

item.title: Security Tight at Laikipia Air Base as Protests Erupt Over Proposed Ebola Isolation Facility
item.description: Hundreds of residents in Nanyuki held protests against the planned establishment of an Ebola quarantine and isolation facility at Laikipia Air Base, raising concerns about Kenya’s role in handling cro...

item.title: One Dawlah Islamiya member killed and two captured in Datu Hoffer, Maguindanao del Sur
item.description: In Datu Hoffer, Maguindanao del Sur, Philippine Army soldiers engaged with remaining members of the now-defunct Dawlah Islamiya group on Saturday, May 30. The encounter resulted in the death of Andami...

item.title: Marilyn Monroe and Her Cats: A Glimpse into the Star’s Love for Animals
item.description: Marilyn Monroe, one of Hollywood’s most iconic figures, was also known for her deep affection for animals, particularly cats. Throughout her life, she owned several feline companions, finding comfort ...

item.title: Trump criticizes political opponents as Iran war negotiations stall
item.description: President Donald Trump posted a series of early-morning messages on his Truth Social platform criticizing both Democrats and members of his own party as he struggles to negotiate an end to the ongoing...
